title: Jeff Skilling
compiled_truth: Jeff Skilling is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1998-01-06 to 2001-11-16), Jeff Skilling sent 79 and received 1650 emails, totalling 1729 interactions. Top correspondents: [Sherri Sera](people/sherri-sera) (16), [Kevin Hannon](people/kevin-hannon) (7), [Joannie Williamson](people/joannie-williamson) (7), [Rick Buy](people/rick-buy) (6), [Rebecca Carter](people/rebecca-carter) (6). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, _sent_mail, sent, sent_items.
